segments.text: Hello, am I speaking with Mr. Aditya Bhatt?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Sir, I'm Dr. Sona Singh, calling on behalf of Tata AIG Life Insurance, and this is regarding your insurance policy.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. Are you comfortable in English?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. Sir, we have decided to go ahead with your proposal, but as a part of the process, we need to conduct a telephonic medical verification in which I'll ask you some verification and medical history questions that will take around 10 to 12 minutes. I hope we can continue with the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, madam, if it's not too much, sir, I'm asking for, would it be possible to do it tomorrow because I'm also headed out. If it's going to take 10-12 minutes, I'd be I'm in the middle of things right now and I'm not at a desk. So would it be okay if we do this tomorrow?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Tomorrow, what time? You tell me. No, not tomorrow. It's better you complete it today.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So then what is the last slot that you have available?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, we can do that. 7:30 that works.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Thank you so much for understanding.
segments.speaker: customer
